name: metal room
hints: An alien metal room with a sealed display case! This is part of the underground complex.
The display case contains something important but is sealed. Look for a way to open it.
MOVE BUTT (press a button) on the case is FATAL. You need another way to open or break it.
W=metal tunnel (9). DO NOT MOVE BUTT = DEATH. Find another method to access the case contents.

needs: Open display case (must be in room)

notes: Alien metal room with sealed display case. W=metal tunnel (9). MOVE BUTT=DEATH. Must find safe way to access case contents.
